channel.title: Hack Club YSWS Programs
channel.description: Active "You Ship, We Ship" programs from Hack Club

item.title: Clutter
item.description:
You ship something to organize your digital life. We ship you a grant to buy something to organize your physical life.

Deadline: September 17, 2025

Join the discussion in #clutter

item.title: Waveform
item.description:
Make your own waveform visualizer, get a grant to buy music

Deadline: September 26, 2025

Join the discussion in #waveform

item.title: Miniverge
item.description:
Spend 2 hours on a bot, get stickers and a chance for a Blåhaj or Minecraft!

Deadline: September 28, 2025

Join the discussion in #miniverge

item.title: Summer of Making
item.description:
Build stuff. Get stuff. Repeat.

Deadline: September 30, 2025

Join the discussion in #summer-of-making

item.title: Penumbra
item.description:
Make shaders, and we'll ship you GPUs and posters!

Deadline: October 8, 2025

Penumbra is a YSWS, where you create shaders on ShaderToy, and get posters of your shaders shipped right to your doorstep! If you spend up to 45 hours across multiple ships, you'll be able to get a GPU like an RTX 3050!

Join the discussion in #penumbra

item.title: Hackberry
item.description:
Built a machine learning project in python, get a personalized raspberry pi kit!

Deadline: October 13, 2025

Join the discussion in #hackberry-hub

item.title: Reactive
item.description:
Ship a website built with React, get $15 to buy a domain.

Deadline: October 16, 2025

Join the discussion in #reactive

item.title: Fanpage
item.description:
Ship a project that celebrates a fandom, and we ship you something related to it!

Deadline: October 17, 2025

Join the discussion in #fanpage

item.title: Emerge
item.description:
create an emergent behaviour, place pixels on the group canvas, get the canvas shipped to you!

Deadline: November 1, 2025

Join the discussion in #emerge

item.title: Haunted Halloween
item.description:
Make a halloween theme for a website or app, get a custom halloween themed sticker and candy!

Deadline: November 3, 2025

Join the discussion in #haunted-halloween

item.title: RSS
item.description:
Build something cool with RSS feeds, get a domain grant.

Deadline: November 7, 2025

Join the discussion in #rss

item.title: Converge
item.description:
Build Discord/Slack bots, we ship domain names, server hosting, Blahajs, and more

Deadline: November 10, 2025

Join the discussion in #converge

item.title: Remix
item.description:
Remix an existing song's beats in Strudel and get 1 month of Spotify, Apple Music, or SoundCloud Pro

Deadline: November 30, 2025

Join the discussion in #remixchallenge

item.title: Playphone
item.description:
Work together to built a godot game, get a custom hackclub badge

Deadline: December 1, 2025

Playphonee is an event where people take turns working on one godot game, and try to build an amazing game together. Everyone who participates will get a cool hackclub badge

Join the discussion in #playphone

item.title: Dummies V2
item.description:
Learn A new programming language and make a project with that, And We will send you school supplies, books, and study materials

Deadline: December 23, 2025

Join the discussion in #dummies

item.title: Haxmas
item.description:
Do workshops, get prizes! Repeat til Christmas!

Deadline: December 25, 2025

Welcome to Haxmas; 12 days of hands-on hacking! From December 13-25, a new workshop drops each day, created by a different member of the Hack Club community. Each workshop is only available on its specific day (day 1's workshop on December 13, day 2's workshop on December 14, and so on), so make sure to participate daily! Each workshop comes with its own special prize, and you'll earn snowflakes that you can redeem for stickers, swag, and more!

Join the discussion in #haxmas

item.title: Meow
item.description:
Spend 5 hours building something to do with cats, get a cat plushie! Ends Christmas Day!

Deadline: December 25, 2025

Meow is a Hack Club YSWS where we'll send you a cat plushie if you ship a project to do with cats!

Join the discussion in #meow

item.title: Bauble
item.description:
3D model an ornament, get it printed and put on the HQ tree! Ends December 25th.

Deadline: December 25, 2025

Bauble is a Hack Club YSWS program where you 3D model an ornament, and you get it printed out put on Oscar, the tree at Hack Club’s HQ in Vermont! After the tree gets taken down, you'll receive your ornament in the mail!

Join the discussion in #bauble

item.title: Fudge
item.description:
Make any project you want, get fudge right from the Shelburne County Store next to HQ!

Deadline: December 31, 2025

Ship any project you want (tracked with Hackatime), get fudge from the Shelburne County Store right next to Hack Club HQ. Work for three hours and get half a pound of fudge, six hours for a full pound.

Join the discussion in #fudge-fudge-fudge

item.title: The Zoo
item.description:
Make an animal themed Svelte site, earn Ikea Animal Plushies

Deadline: December 31, 2025

The Zoo is a Svelte YSWS where participants build an animal themed Svelte site and earn Mynts (currency) which can be turned into an HCB grant at the end to buy Ikea plushies. Get one giant Djungleskog, or multiple mini Blahaj, it's all up to you. Here's the best part: the better your submission is, the more Mynts you earn!

Join the discussion in #the-zoo

item.title: TerminalCraft
item.description:
Build a terminal program and earn 5$ per hour for building your program to get hackable hardware.

Deadline: December 31, 2025

Build & publish a cross-platform terminal app. Be creative, open-source it, and snag your grant !

Join the discussion in #terminal-craft

item.title: Accelerate
item.description:
Build physics simulations, get prizes!

Deadline: January 10, 2026

Join the discussion in #accelerate

item.title: Woof
item.description:
Spend 5 or more hours making a dog-themed project and get a dog plushie!

Deadline: January 14, 2026

Spend 5 hours on a dog related project (with hackatime) and get a dog plushie either shipped from HQ (US only) or through a $25 HCB Grant card.

Join the discussion in #woof

item.title: Pxl
item.description:
Code any project, place pixels on a r/place-like canvas!

Deadline: January 31, 2026

Pxl is a YSWS where you can either code for pixels (you can double dip this, no need to submit!), or make projects for merch with the final canvas!

Join the discussion in #pxl

item.title: HomeLab
item.description:
You ship projects related to having a self hosted server at home, and we ship things to help you create your own setup

Deadline: January 31, 2026

A YSWS where you ship projects related to having a self hosted server at home (tracked with hackatime), and we ship things to help you create your own setup (or update a setup you already have!)\

Join the discussion in #home-lab

item.title: Reboot
item.description:
Restore old projects, upgrade your desktop setup!

Deadline: February 11, 2026

Join the discussion in #reboot

item.title: Hackvault
item.description:
You make a password manager and we'll ship you a Yubikey!

Deadline: February 22, 2026

Hackvault is the epic YSWS where you can earn either a Yubikey 5C for 5 hours of work making a password manager or for 10 hours a Yubikey Bio! Make anything from a server os for passwords to a mobile app!

Join the discussion in #hackvault

item.title: Wacky Files
item.description:
Find the wackiest ways to store files for free and earn $3/hour with multipliers!

Deadline: March 1, 2026

Sick of cloud-based storage? Own your files the weird way! Find the wackiest and most creative ways to host files for free. Convert binary to static and upload to YouTube, 3D print notches to encode data, or invent something completely absurd - just keep it wacky! Requirements: - Must be able to store the test banana image in all its yellow glory - Solution must be reproducible and documented - A representation is okay (storing binary without rendering is fine) - Must be able to upload AND download the file - Track time with Hackatime (use Lapse for hardware projects) Earn $3/hour baseline, with voting multipliers: ⭐ = 1x, ⭐⭐ = 2x, ⭐⭐⭐ = 3x

Join the discussion in #wacky-files

item.title: Scraps
item.description:
Create projects, earn scraps, try your luck, get prizes, repeat

Deadline: March 4, 2026

Join the discussion in #scraps

item.title: Rework
item.description:
CAD a 3d printer mod, get $75 and 1kg of Hack Club filament to build it!

Deadline: March 6, 2026

Hack Club Rework gives you $75 + exclusive free filament to physically modify your 3D printer. Got an old Ender 3? Make it print faster. Got a Bambu? Hack it and add custom features. Have a unique idea? Make it happen. Rework is made for all hardware based 3d printer mods. Design submissions for Rework end on March 6th, 2026. Get started early and post your progress in the Hack Club Slack!

item.title: Aces
item.description:
Create your own digital board game, get a grant to make it a real physical game, and then get a trip to Washington DC to show off your game to the public at AwesomeCon!

Deadline: March 13, 2026

Join the discussion in #aces

item.title: Mosaic
item.description:
Build a website every month with a different theme. Get stuff. Repeat.

Deadline: March 14, 2026

For 12 months, every month you get a random theme to build a full-stack web application! Earn cool prizes like a 3D Printer Grant and even a 1 year Render Hosting Plan!!

Join the discussion in #mosaic

item.title: Blueprint
item.description:
Design a hardware project, up to $400 to build it!

Deadline: March 31, 2026

Join the discussion in #blueprint

item.title: Milkyway
item.description:
Make games, build houses, and get awesome prizes like a flight to a hyper-immersive game jam in Singapore!

Deadline: April 3, 2026

Join the discussion in #milkyway

item.title: Slushies
item.description:
Earn $5 for deploying your Flask app

Deadline: April 7, 2026

Join the discussion in #slushies

item.title: Construct
item.description:
Design projects using CAD, Get a 3d printer to print them!

Deadline: April 19, 2026

Join the discussion in #construct

item.title: Flavortown
item.description:
Cook personal projects. Win free prizes.

Deadline: April 30, 2026

Join the discussion in #flavortown

item.title: Remixed
item.description:
Ship something music related, get stuff to help you make music!

Deadline: April 30, 2026

Join the discussion in #remixed-bulletin

item.title: Sleepover
item.description:
Learn to code and fly to an all girls slumber party hackathon!

Deadline: May 1, 2026

Join the discussion in #athena-sleepover

item.title: TrailIt
item.description:
Produce A web-app, and get equipment to produce a Video!

Deadline: May 15, 2026

Join the discussion in #trailit-ysws

item.title: Stasis
item.description:
Build hardware projects and fly to a hardware hackathon in Austin, Texas

Deadline: May 18, 2026

Join the discussion in #stasis

item.title: Hack Club: The Game
item.description:
Code for 40 hours & fly out to Manhattan to compete in a IRL adventure game!

Deadline: May 22, 2026

Join the discussion in #hack-club-the-game

item.title: Cœur
item.description:
Make an e-card, earn heart themed prizes (including a sweatshirt!!!)

Deadline: May 24, 2026

E-cards are a really cool and engaging way to send someone a card, and there's so many different things you can do with them! Cœur is a new YSWS where participants build e-cards about something or someone that they like and earn Hearts (currency) which can used to buy different heart themed prizes (including special stickers and a sweatshirt)! Participants can make multiple submissions and save up for bigger prizes!

Join the discussion in #coeur

item.title: Boot
item.description:
Make your own OS, get hardware to run it!

Deadline: June 1, 2026

Join the discussion in #boot

item.title: Fallout
item.description:
Build 60h of hardware projects, visit Shenzhen, China!

Deadline: July 1, 2026

Join the discussion in #fallout

item.title: Forge
item.description:
Forge is a Hack Club YSWS (You ship, we ship) program where teens like yourself can design and build hardware projects, and get them funded! Forge your project now

Deadline: August 1, 2026

Join the discussion in #forge

item.title: birthday-cards
item.description:
You ship a birthday themed project we ship a birthday card!

Deadline: August 8, 2026

Join the discussion in #birthday-cards-ysws

item.title: Macondo
item.description:
Make projects. Win free prizes. Fly to Bogotá, Colombia for a 3-day scrappy hackathon

Join the discussion in #macondo

item.title: Fix Hack Club
item.description:
Contribute to Hack Club repositories, get a grant of your choice!

Join the discussion in #pullquests

item.title: Polygon
item.description:
Build a 3d website using three.js and get a grant to go watch your favourite movies!

Join the discussion in #polygon

item.title: Beest
item.description:
Build a real project, qualify to fly to the Netherlands, and build a mechanical animal at a week-long hackathon.

Join the discussion in #beest

item.title: RaspAPI
item.description:
Build an API, get a Raspberry Pi Zero 2W to host it on!

RaspAPI is a Hack Club YSWS where you build an original, publicly accessible API using any language or framework, log your hours with Hackatime, and earn a Raspberry Pi Zero 2W to host it on. Your API needs at least 3 GET and 1 POST endpoint, docs at /docs, and a public git repo with a README. Reviewers award multipliers based on what your API implements, so the more creative and complex, the better!

Join the discussion in #raspapi

item.title: Jus'STUDY
item.description:
Get study stuff by shipping projects that help you and others study!

Jus'STUDY is a YSWS, where you build Study Related Things and get Cool Study Materials in return!

Join the discussion in #jus-study

item.title: Resolution
item.description:
Resolution is an 8-week challenge where you set goals, ship every week, and earn prizes for following through.

Join the discussion in #resolution

item.title: Enclosure
item.description:
Design a custom enclosure for your project, get a 3D print of it shipped to you and tier based prizes!

Join the discussion in #enclosure

item.title: HackCraft
item.description:
Create a Minecraft mod, get Stickers, Minecraft, another game or a server and terraria!

Join HackCraft to build and ship your own Minecraft mod. Access exclusive resources and a supportive community.

Join the discussion in #mc-modding

item.title: Lumen
item.description:
Make a Minecraft shaderpack, get Minecraft and GPUs!

Join the discussion in #mc-modding

item.title: Hacksaber
item.description:
Ship a Beat Saber Modchart, and we'll ship custom T-Shirt designed by a HC member, or a copy of the game! Live YSWS!

Join the discussion in #hacksaber

item.title: Fusering
item.description:
Design a keyring, get your keyring and a carabiner to hang it from!

Join the discussion in #fusering

item.title: BakeBuild
item.description:
Design a cookie cutter, get it shipped!

You ship : A CAD model of a cookie cutter, we ship : A 3D printed model of your custom cookie cutter & cookies!

Join the discussion in #bakebuild

item.title: iplace
item.description:
A collaborative canvas of websites, made by Hack Clubbers! Get hosting and domain credits!

Join the discussion in #iplace

item.title: Hacklet v2
item.description:
Build a bookmarklet, get food for your club!

Join the discussion in #hacklet

item.title: Terminal Craft v5
item.description:
Build and publish your own terminal program to earn $4/hr

Join the discussion in #terminal-craft

item.title: Sprig
item.description:
Build a JS game and play it on your own console.

Join the discussion in #sprig

item.title: Boba Drops
item.description:
Build a website and get boba!

Join the discussion in #boba

item.title: Storyboard
item.description:
Make a themed visual novel, earn prizes!

Join the discussion in #storyboard
